name: ai-effort-tracker
description: Track human vs AI effort, time, and cost per work item / branch

commands.title: AI Effort Tracker: Show Session Summary
AI Effort Tracker: Set Tracking Mode
AI Effort Tracker: Log Credits Used
AI Effort Tracker: Log a Chat Turn
AI Effort Tracker: Start Tracking Session
AI Effort Tracker: Stop Tracking Session

aiEffortTracker.idleThresholdSeconds.description: While VS Code is focused, switch to Idle after this many seconds with no editor activity (typing, cursor moves, AI writes).

aiEffortTracker.codingActiveSeconds.description: Keep counting 'Human Coding' for this many seconds after your last keystroke.

aiEffortTracker.aiActiveSeconds.description: Keep counting 'AI Generating' for this many seconds after the last Copilot/agent write.

aiEffortTracker.baselineLocPerMinute.description: Your baseline hand-coding speed (lines of code per minute) used to estimate time saved by AI.

aiEffortTracker.hourlyRateUsd.description: Developer hourly cost in USD, used to value the time saved (ROI).

aiEffortTracker.usdPerCredit.description: USD cost per Copilot premium request (credit), used to estimate AI spend.

aiEffortTracker.githubToken.description: GitHub personal access token (needs 'manage_billing:copilot' scope for Copilot Metrics API)

aiEffortTracker.githubOrg.description: GitHub organization name for Copilot Metrics API (e.g. 'myorg')

aiEffortTracker.githubRepo.description: GitHub repo in 'owner/repo' format for repo-level Copilot Metrics (e.g. 'myorg/myrepo')
